title: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi – Research Assistant and Field Investigators – 4 Posts
shortInfo: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Research Assistant and Field Investigators. Candidates with Ph.D./M.Phil./MA Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 09-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Sri Venkateswara College Delhi official website.

basic_details.job_title: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant and Field Investigators Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Research Assistant and Field Investigators. Candidates with Ph.D./M.Phil./MA Can Apply Online. qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D./M.Phil./Post graduate in social science discipline with minimum 55% marks.

salary_details.pay_scale: Research Assistant: ₹37,000/- per month (Consolidated); Field Investigators: ₹20,000/- per month (Consolidated)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Sri Venkateswara College Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
